statement.markdown: Implement a function that validates a GIT checkout branch name. A branch name is valid if it matches the pattern `^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9.-]*$` and is not a reserved GIT name. The function should return `true` if the branch name is valid, and `false` otherwise. Reserved GIT names include `HEAD`, `ORIG_HEAD`, `MERGE_HEAD`, `CHERRY_PICK_HEAD`, and `REFLOG`. The function should handle edge cases such as empty strings, branch names with leading or trailing whitespace, and branch names with non-ASCII characters.
statement.inputFormat: A string representing the GIT branch name.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean indicating whether the branch name is valid.
statement.notes: The function should not crash or produce unexpected behavior when encountering invalid input.

constraints.description: The maximum length of the branch name.

examples.explanation: The branch name is valid and matches the pattern.
The branch name is reserved and invalid.
The branch name is empty and invalid.
The branch name has leading whitespace and is invalid.
The branch name has trailing whitespace and is invalid.
The branch name contains an invalid character and is invalid.

hints.text: Use a regular expression to match the branch name pattern.

editorial.title: Correcting GIT Checkout Branch Validation
editorial.intuition: The function should validate the branch name against a reserved GIT name and a regular expression.
editorial.bruteForce: Check if the branch name matches the reserved GIT names and then check if it matches the regular expression.
editorial.betterSolution: Use a single regular expression to match both the reserved GIT names and the branch name pattern.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a single regular expression to match both the reserved GIT names and the branch name pattern, and handle edge cases such as empty strings and branch names with leading or trailing whitespace.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The function should return true if the branch name is valid and false otherwise.
editorial.dryRun: Test the function with various branch names, including valid and invalid ones.
